## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SunSnow;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SunSnow { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
weather, air conditioning, temperature, hot, cold, seasons

## Categories
weather

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/sun-snow)
